2605.17204.title: Event-Grounded Sparse Autoencoders for Vision-Language-Action Policies
2605.17204.paper_summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies translate language and visual inputs into robot actions, where their hidden representations directly shape closed-loop behavior. However, mechanistic interpretability tools from language and vision-language models do not transfer cleanly to VLAs: outputs are robot actions rather than human-readable tokens, and interventions can only be tested via expensive closed-loop rollouts. We propose an event-grounded interpretability pipeline that anchors SAE feature analysis to behavioral events rather than text contexts. End-effector keyframes are clustered within each task using visual, state, and temporal cues, linking SAE features to behaviorally salient events and, via optional VLM annotations, to semantic context. To our knowledge, our pipeline is among the first to ground SAE-based VLA analysis in closed-loop behavioral events. Across two simulation architectures and a real-robot study, event-grounded ranking yields the strongest causal effects on OpenVLA and transfers to the continuous action chunks of $π_{0.5}$. SAE is a sparse but imperfect intervention basis: usability varies with architecture and intervention site, and aggressive intervention reveals safety and interpretability limits. Overall, event-grounded SAE analysis emerges as a practical starting point for behavior-anchored VLA interpretability, motivating future work on SAE features beyond action-aligned coordinates, finer-grained closed-loop evaluation, and safe interventions for high-stakes VLA deployments. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/xc-j/Event-SAE}.
2605.17204.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 策略將語言和視覺輸入轉換為機器人行動，其中它們的隱藏表示直接塑造閉環行為。<lb/>然而，來自語言和視覺-語言模型的機械可解釋性工具並不能乾淨地轉移到 VLA：輸出是機器人行動，而不是人類可讀的標記，干預只能通過昂貴的閉環推進進行測試。<lb/>我們提出了一個事件基礎的可解釋性管道，將 SAE 特徵分析錨定於行為事件，而不是文本上下文。<lb/>在每個任務中，終端執行器關鍵幀使用視覺、狀態和時間線索進行聚類，將 SAE 特徵與行為上顯著的事件聯繫起來，並通過可選的 VLM 註釋與語義上下文聯繫。<lb/>據我們所知，我們的管道是首批將基於 SAE 的 VLA 分析錨定於閉環行為事件的管道之一。<lb/>在兩個模擬架構和一個實機器人研究中，基於事件的排名對 OpenVLA 產生了最強的因果效應，並轉移到 $π_{0.5}$ 的連續行動塊。<lb/>SAE 是一個稀疏但不完美的干預基礎：可用性因架構和干預位置而異，激進的干預揭示了安全性和可解釋性的限制。<lb/>總體而言，基於事件的 SAE 分析作為行為錨定的 VLA 可解釋性的實用起點出現，激勵未來在行動對齊坐標之外的 SAE 特徵、細粒度的閉環評估以及高風險 VLA 部署的安全干預方面的工作。<lb/>代碼可在 \url{https://github.com/xc-j/Event-SAE} 獲得。
2605.17204.author: Xinchen Jin et.al.
2605.17204.authors: Xinchen Jin, Aditya Chatterjee, Pranav Kumar, Rohan Paleja
